scripts.import: npm run wp-env run cli wp db import sql/wpenv.sql
scripts.g-import: gunzip < sql/wpenv.sql.gz | npm run wp-env run cli wp db import -
scripts.export: npm run wp-env run cli wp db export sql/wpenv.sql
scripts.g-export: npm run wp-env run cli wp db export - | gzip > sql/wpenv.sql.gz
scripts.wp-setup: npm run wp-env start && npm run import
